Rescue Helicopter

Are you ready to be a hero? People trapped on the roof need you! You are the only one who can operate the helicopter and have to save them with the helicopter's rope. Rescue Helicopter is a 2D helicopter game where you drive a helicopter and rescue people.

Play Rescue Helicopter Online

Loading game...
About Rescue Helicopter

Are you ready to be a hero? People trapped on the roof need you! You are the only one who can operate the helicopter and have to save them with the helicopter's rope. Rescue Helicopter is a 2D helicopter game where you drive a helicopter and rescue people. This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Rescue Helicopter in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Driving game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Rescue Helicopter for free?

Yes. Rescue Helicopter is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Rescue Helicopter?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
